rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees for component ports belong in component type scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE contracts in valid scopes
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level assignments must be in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
